_meta.vertical: nursing / health (AIN, PCW, aged care, home care, disability support, clinical care)
_meta.purpose: Canonical skill taxonomy for the nursing/health vertical. A phrase that resolves here gets its `category` from THIS table — the LLM never decides the category. The same table classifies BOTH the CV and the JD, so a skill is bucketed identically on both sides.

category_keys.domain_knowledge: Clinical / care competencies — the WHAT-FIELD. Renders as the headline 'Care Skills' / 'Clinical Skills' line for nursing.
category_keys.technical: Named care SOFTWARE / SYSTEMS and generic computing — the named PRODUCT, never the clinical activity. Renders as the secondary 'Other Skills' line for nursing.

rules.activity_vs_product: A clinical ACTIVITY (e.g. 'electronic medication administration') is domain_knowledge. The SOFTWARE that performs it ('BESTMed', 'MedMobile') is technical.
rules.variants: Each entry's `variants` are alternate surface forms that all resolve to `canonical`. This list IS the synonym map used by deterministic CV-JD matching.
rules.credentials_excluded: Licences / checks / vaccinations are NOT here — they live in _universal_noise.json (type=credential) and route to Registration & Licences.

_meta.review_status: DRAFT — Phase 0 seed (~ correct order of magnitude). Add the long tail as real runs surface misses (safe-drop + log). Seeded from the CV categoriser vocabulary + the Hardi/Nepean/Rashmi runs.
